name: Sketchbook Saturday
description:
Sketchbook Saturday
Sketchbooks are a private, and intimate space for artists to think, experiment, and try new ways of designing or creating art. Sketchbook Saturday is a bi-monthly event where artists from the Penciljam community share their sketchbooks and creative process.
About the Artist | Abburi Madhuha
A third year business student with a special interest in all things art and design. She especially enjoy illustration and storytelling. Abbo is currently teaching herself different aspects of art through independent study and personal projects.

Abbo grew up inspired by artists she discovered online. She spent countless hours watching YouTube speedpaints, animatics, and sketchbook tours, which sparked her love for creating original characters, worlds, and stories. More recently, her focus has shifted toward strengthening her fundamentals, doing observational drawing, building a visual library, and drawing from imagination. She loves experimenting with new styles and is always looking to learn something new to develop her artistic voice.
How to attend this session

 	Please register here to attend this session. (Link will be up soon)
 	The session starts at 2pm on Saturday, at Blr Design Centre
 	Reach the venue 15mins before 2pm.

In Collaboration with Blrdesign Centre
The BLR Design Centre is a collaborative workroom run by Mod Foundation focused on transforming urban living environments through architectural partnerships, cultural dialogue, and design-driven solutions.

name: Penciljam at NGMA
description:
Manikyavelu Mansion, once home to businessman-turned-aristocrat Vilum Manickavelu Mudaliar, was acquired by the government at an auction. Restored and repurposed, it became the southern centre of the National Gallery of Modern Art (NGMA) in 2009. Read more on NGMA here.
How to join this session
You don't need artistic skill to participate in this event - just boundless curiosity and a love for drawing. To connect with other participants, please use our community on Discord.

If this is your first time and would like future update on events, and more. Please register here.

Once you arrive at the location, choose a spot you'd like to sketch and get comfortable.
Rules at this location
No large easels are not allowed within the Galllery.
No wet media allowed inside the gallery/exhibit spaces
Be mindful to not block the walking paths.
Cafeteria is a billable space, so please order something if you choose to sit here.
Things to carry for this session

 	A sketchbook/paper/drawing surface
 	Pencils or any medium you would like to try out
 	A portable chair/mat. If the location has no seating, we tend to sit on the ground
 	Water bottle and snacks

How to get there
Follow the location map provided
Closest metro station: Vidhan Soudha (walk towards the Gallery, about 20 mins)
